privileged_info_summary: The task metadata claims are verified facts grounded in real-world data: (1) Eiffel Tower is a real monument at 48.8584°N, 2.2945°E in Paris, France; (2) Colosseum is a real monument at 41.8902°N, 12.4922°E in Rome, Italy; (3) Parthenon is a real monument at 37.9715°N, 23.7257°E in Athens, Greece. The expected visitor-to-monument mappings (sophie.martin→Eiffel Tower, luca.rossi→Colosseum, elena.petrakis→Parthenon) match the profile nationalities and monuments created in setup_task.sh. The country assignments (France, Italy, Greece) are correct. The hotel, restaurant, and attraction counts (all = 1) are verified by the setup script which creates exactly 1 hotel and 1 restaurant per profile. The curation tag 'heritage_trio_2026q1' is a synthetic identifier specified in the task requirements.
